text: <par> hard to tell if either or both syllables are from 632 or 635. Or 632,625 by analogy with Lahu Xi, Lisu.</par>
<par>Gazhuo <latinform>ɕo³³</latinform> and Shuikui <latinform>ɕiõ³³</latinform> are probably loans from Chinese <hanform>胸</hanform> (Mand. <latinform>xiōng</latinform>) ‘chest’.</par>
